title: Deliciously Dense Dutch White Yam Hash
description: A traditional Dutch dish featuring white yam, soffritto-base, and low-fat-friendly ingredients, served on a hot stone plate.
instructions: Preheat the hot stone plate to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the diced white yam, chopped onion, chopped carrot, chopped celery, and minced garlic.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the white yam mixture to the skillet and cook for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the salt, black pepper, and paprika to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook for an additional 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Using a spatula, shape the mixture into a flat round shape on the hot stone plate.
Cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until the bottom is crispy and golden brown.
